# Result Guru - Sarkari Result & Govt Jobs Portal

Result Guru is India's leading Sarkari Result and government notifications dashboard. It provides verified, real-time access to recruitment notifications, examination results, admit cards, and state-level welfare programs.

## Target Audience
- Candidates appearing for Indian national and state-level competitive exams.
- Students seeking scholarships and admissions info.
- Citizens looking for government welfare schemes.

## Key Sections
- **Sarkari Jobs**: Latest recruitment notices from SSC, UPSC, Railways, Banking, and Police.
- **Results**: Real-time examination result links and marksheets.
- **Admit Cards**: Direct links to download examination hall tickets.
- **Syllabus & Exam Patterns**: Structured deep-dives into examination criteria.
- **State-Wise Directory**: Regional job updates for all Indian States & UTs.
- **Scholarships & Schemes**: Support for student welfare and public benefits.

## Data Structure
- Primary Listing Pages: `/job`, `/result`, `/admit-card`, `/syllabus`, etc.
- Regional Hubs: `/[type]/in/[state-slug]`
- Organization Hubs: `/[type]/org/[org-slug]`
- Educational Hubs: `/[type]/for/[qualification-slug]`

## Contact & Information
- Official Website: https://resultguru.co.in
- Telegram Community: https://t.me/resultguru247
- Purpose: Verification, Aggregation, and Simplification of official government data.

> This file (llms.txt) is provided to help Large Language Models and AI bots understand the site's structure and purpose.
